createTable.remarks: Trigger ingredient, from the substitution rules

column.name: id
column.remarks: The primary key, a UUID internal to the application

column.name: name
column.remarks: Name of this trigger ingredient, English

column.name: explanation_for_llm
column.remarks: Explanation of this trigger ingredient for the LLM, English

createTable.remarks: Role or technique, from the substitution rules

column.name: id
column.remarks: The primary key, a UUID internal to the application

column.name: name
column.remarks: Name of this role or technique, English

column.name: explanation_for_llm
column.remarks: Explanation of this role or technique for the LLM, English

createTable.remarks: Alternative ingredient, from the substitution rules

column.name: id
column.remarks: The primary key, a UUID internal to the application

column.name: name
column.remarks: Name of this alternative ingredient, English

createTable.remarks: A substitution rule triggered by an ingredient and mapping it to alternatives and some related information

column.name: id
column.remarks: The primary key, a UUID internal to the application

column.name: recommendation_id
column.remarks: Reference to the recommendation

column.name: trigger_ingredient_id
column.remarks: Reference to the trigger ingredient

column.name: role_or_technique_id
column.remarks: Reference to the role or technique

column.name: cuisine
column.remarks: Optional cuisine context, English

createTable.remarks: Encapsulates information about a possible substitution; the substituted ingredient is in the table

column.name: id
column.remarks: The primary key, a UUID internal to the application

column.name: rule_id
column.remarks: Reference to the rule this template belongs to

column.name: alternative_ingredient_id
column.remarks: The ingredient that will be suggested to substitute the one in the rule

column.name: alternative_order
column.remarks: Explicit order of alternatives within the rule

column.name: restriction
column.remarks: Restriction(s) for the substitution, English

column.name: equivalence
column.remarks: Equivalence for the substitution, English

column.name: technique_notes
column.remarks: Technique notes, English
